resources.string: Notifies you when a background scan finishes.
Scanned %1$d photo(s); no new items to identify

Home Inventory scans the photos you take with your camera to build a searchable index of your belongings. Photos are processed on your device; only photos of objects (never people) are sent for identification. We never move or delete your originals.
You\'ve granted access to only some photos, so new camera photos won\'t be scanned automatically. For full background scanning, allow access to all photos.
